title.en: Linux File Descriptors: From Everything Is a File to fd Kernel Abstractions and Engineering Practice
title.zh: Linux 文件描述符研究：从“一切皆文件”到 fd 的内核抽象与工程实践

summary.en: A systematic study of Linux file descriptors, open file descriptions, VFS, inodes, sockets, epoll, inheritance semantics, and production engineering practices.
summary.zh: 系统梳理 Linux 文件描述符的来源、open file description、VFS、inode、socket、epoll、继承语义和线上工程实践。

readingDirection.en: Read this when learning the Linux I/O model, troubleshooting fd leaks, understanding socket and epoll lifecycles, or designing resource governance for high-concurrency services.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在学习 Linux I/O 模型、排查 fd 泄漏、理解 socket/epoll 生命周期，或设计高并发服务资源治理时阅读。
